title: passerina javanica
intro: Passerina javanica, also known as Javanese Passerina or Passerina, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Passerina javanica include the ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various infections, as well as its potential to protect against certain diseases. In traditional herbal medicine, Passerina javanica can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and is often used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, colds, and digestive issues.
